name: bento-window
title: Bento Window
description: Tile multiple windows of the same app into a bento-box grid. The grid auto-adapts to the window count (2×2, 3×3, 5×2, etc.).
author: Popo

commands.name: tile
commands.title: Auto Tile
commands.description: Tile windows into a grid that auto-adapts to the window count. Choose Tile Scope to target a single app (by priority list or the focused window) or every window on the active desktop.

preferences.name: scope
preferences.title: Tile Scope
preferences.description: App List: tile windows of the first matching app from the list below. All Windows: tile every tileable window on the active desktop.

preferences.name: appName
preferences.title: Target App Names (Comma-Separated)
preferences.description: Apps to tile, tried in order. Example: Ghostty, Terminal, iTerm2. Leave empty to auto-detect from the focused window.

preferences.name: gap
preferences.title: Window Gap (px)
preferences.description: Spacing between tiles and screen edges. 0 means flush tiles (default).
